coreJobStatement: Enable safe, reliable, energy-efficient vertical transport of people and goods within multi-story structures
hierarchy: Process VN (L7 through L4) — vertical transportation equipment manufacturing chain
marketSize: Guide rail segment ~$3.5-5.4B globally (2024); CAGR ~5-6% through 2030; Key OEM buyers: Otis, KONE, Schindler, TK Elevator, Mitsubishi Electric

l6Systems.name: Structural & Mechanical Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manufacture car frame, counterweight frame, and load-bearing steel components

l6Systems.name: Hoistway Components Manufacturing
l6Systems.jobFamily: Produce guide rail profiles, buffer assemblies, and safety devices defining cabin path

l6Systems.name: Drive System Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble traction machine, gearbox, motor, or hydraulic unit converting power to cabin motion

l6Systems.name: Control & Safety Electronics Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Integrate elevator controller, frequency drive, and safety chain electronics

l6Systems.name: Cabin Fabrication & Interior Fitting
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble car frame, sill profiles, wall panels, door systems, and interior finish

l6Systems.name: Factory Integration & Quality Certification
l6Systems.jobFamily: Validate complete system against EN 81-20/50 / ASME A17.1 before shipment

l6Systems.name: Quality Management (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Inspection, test, certification (EN 81, ISO 9001, ASME A17.1) runs at every core step

vnUnits.name: Guide Rail System
vnUnits.functionalJob: ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION (at L4 within this L5). Solid T-section steel rail (cold-drawn or hot-rolled + machined, ~78%). Hollow section steel guide rail (~18%). Stainless/aluminium special rail (~4%).
vnUnits.description: Steel guide rail profile body - constrains cabin and counterweight lateral movement along hoistway axis

vnUnits.name: Buffer System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Pit-mounted buffer absorbing cabin overtravel. Oil hydraulic buffer (~75%), spring buffer (~23%), polyurethane buffer (~2%).

vnUnits.name: Traction Machine
vnUnits.functionalJob: Gearless PMSM (~50%, growing), geared VFD induction motor (~30%, declining), gearless AC induction (~15%).

zollernPosition: ZOLLERN holds PRIMARY position at L4 Steel Guide Rail Profile Body within L5 Guide Rail System under L6b Hoistway Components Manufacturing. Cold-drawn precision T-section at IT8 tolerance with in-line induction hardening to 64 HRC. ~40% market share of the solid T-section segment.
strategicPosition: Strongest ZOLLERN coverage profile of all existing markets. Wins 15/23 needs, net weighted delta +342. All losses are minor (delta=-1). Six needs with delta >= +4 including ES-12 (flange width batch variation, +6 delta = +54 weighted). Analogy leverage: T-section geometry transfers to mining cage, crane runway, and forklift mast markets.
